About Perla

Nations of Sky is building a distinctive coastal development in Egypt, Perla North Coast Resort. The project covers an impressive 325-acre land area in El Dabaa, one of Sahel’s upscale areas. It is smartly situated on the 173rd km of International Coastal Road, also known as Alexandria - Marsa Matrouh Road. 


Perla Natives of the Sea has a pristine 800-meter beachfront and a broad range of impeccable amenities. The resort was designed with a distinguished low-density approach, offering various property types for sale. 

Perla North Coast Location - Al Dabaa

Nations of Sky smartly chose the Perla North Coast Resort location. It is exactly situated on Kilo 173 of International Coastal Road, which places the project in El Dabaa.


This prime location puts Perla by Nations of Sky:


  • 10 minutes from El Dabaa Road Exit.
  • 20 minutes from Ras El Hekma Bay.
  • 20 minutes from Sidi Abdel Rahman.
  • Within a 20-minute drive from El Alamein International Airport.


Check our Sahel Map to know the exact location of North Coast’s resorts and calculate the distance between them. 

Perla Nations of Sky Nearby Roads & Resorts

Perla Resort is easily reachable from Alexandria - Marsa Matrouh Road and El Dabaa Road. Moreover, the project’s strategic location puts it near other fancy real estate developments in North Coast, including:


  • DOSE North Coast Resort
  • The Waterway North Coast
  • LVLS Mountain View

Perla North Coast Master Plan

Spanning 325 acres in North Coast, Perla by Nations of Sky has a smartly designed master plan that utilizes this land area. The project was designed with a low-density approach, which creates a balanced environment combining privacy, comfort, and vibrant social experiences.


Perla North Coast’s master plan encompasses an extensive network of water features, vast outdoor spaces, luxurious beachfront properties, and verdant natural elements. This offers residents a premium Mediterranean lifestyle.


The Perla Resort master plan outlines the following features:


  • 800-meter white sandy beachfront.
  • Extensive network of sparkling lagoons, integrated throughout the master plan.
  • Beachfront and lagoon-front residences.
  • Hospitality-inspired residences.
  • Lush landscapes and various outdoor spaces with numerous activities.

Major Facilities & Services of Perla by Nations of Sky

Nations of Sky equipped Perla North Coast Resort with unparalleled services and facilities to ensure vacationers’ satisfaction. These amenities include, but are not limited to:


  • Pedestrian-friendly pathways.
  • Jogging and cycling tracks.
  • Hospitality-inspired amenities.
  • A myriad of social and recreational venues, for both adults and kids.
  • Walkable waterfront promenades.
  • Comprehensive security system, operating around the clock.
  • CCTV surveillance cameras, covering the premises.
  • Functional parking areas.
  • Maintenance and gardening services.

Perla North Coast Resort Properties

You can find a notable collection of properties for sale in Perla North Coast Resort by Nations of Sky. These units vary between:


  • Chalets
  • Villas
  • Townhouses 
  • Mansions


Perla Natives of the Sea’s properties have a contemporary Mediterranean architectural style. These units come in various sizes, prices, designs, and features, catering to different buyers’ preferences and elegant taste. 


It’s also worth noting that the Perla North Coast units have magical views of the Mediterranean Sea or the extensive network of lagoons spread throughout the resort. 


Own your elite properties in North Coast through Nawy. Call 15211 to purchase your house in Perla by Nations of Sky now.

Perks of Owning Your Unit in Perla Resort

Nations of Sky made sure Perla North Coast is a smart investment option and a distinguished development to purchase your summer house in. This was achieved by:


  • Planning a low-density coastal destination.
  • Implementing a plethora of amenities in the resort to ensure residents’ utmost comfort.
  • Smartly choosing the project’s location to be in El Dabaa, a short drive from many of Sahel’s popular destinations and other elite resorts.
  • Building various property types in Perla, so you can choose what suits you best. 

About Nations of Sky

Nations of Sky, the mastermind behind Perla Sahel Resort, is one of the reputable real estate developers in Egypt. The company was established in 2024, and despite its short history, it has been leaving its golden imprint on the market since its inception. 


It crafts uniquely designed spaces with a visionary approach. Nations of Sky has an impressive portfolio of real estate developments in Egypt’s prominent areas, including New Cairo and New Zayed City.


Its portfolio includes the following projects:


  • Jirian Compound
  • Zomra East

El Dabaa North Coast

Situated between Ras Al Hikma and Sidi Abdelrahman, Al Dabaa is one of the mesmerizing areas in North Coast, Egypt. It is around 73 km from El Alamein, 170 km from Alexandria, and 340 km away from Cairo. 


Al Dabaa extends from the 155th km to the 177th km of International Coastal Road, boasting many elite real estate projects, including:


  • Seazen by Al Qamzi Developments
  • La Vista Bay by La Vista Developments
  • Hacienda Blue by Palm Hills Developments

FAQs

Where is the Perla North Coast location?

El Dabaa, Kilo 173

Who is the Perla North Coast developer?

Nations of Sky

How large is Perla Resort by Nations of Sky?

325 acres

What properties are for sale in Perla North Coast by Nations of Sky?

Chalets - villas - townhouses - mansions

What are the amenities offered in Perla North Coast?

800-meter beachfront - a network of lagoons - hospitality-inspired amenities - waterfront promenades
